products.title: Attack on the Arizona
products.description: To commemorate the 80th Anniversary of the infamous attack that brought America into the Second World War, and to remember those Americans who fought and died at Pearl Harbor, award-winning artist Keith Burns has given us Attack on the Arizona – a dramatic painting capturing the heart-stopping moment when Japanese Aichi D-3A1 dive-bombers launched their devastating attack on the Arizona. Overall print size approx.: 26" wide x 19 ½" high. Image size approx.: 23" wide x 15" high.

products.title: Attacking The Sorpe – Operation Chastise: 16/17 May 1943
products.description: A New Limited Edition print commemorating the 80th Anniversary of the Dambuster Raids – personally signed by the last survivor and released posthumously at his request, Squadron Leader George 'Johnny' Johnson MBE DFM. Overall print size: 27 ½" wide x 20 ¼" high. Image size: 24" wide x 15 ½" high.
products.editionInfo: Collectors Edition 25, Artist Proof 5, Remarques 15, Double Remarque 10

products.title: Barry Sheene
products.description: Barry Steven Frank Sheene MBE (11 September 1950 – 10 March 2003) was a British professional motorcycle racer. He competed in Grand Prix motorcycle racing and was a two-time world champion, winning consecutive 500cc titles in 1976 and 1977. Edition Size: 150 Giclee Edition. Image Size: 30 cm x 40 cm.

products.title: Before The Storm
products.description: Formed in early 1941, long before events at Pearl Harbor, a small group of American fighter pilots volunteered to fight the mighty Japanese Air Force. Known as the American Volunteer Group – THE FLYING TIGERS – during their brief six-month period of combat, and with rarely more than 50 serviceable fighters at their disposal, this small band managed to destroy some 300 Japanese aircraft. Image size: 20 ¾" wide x 9 ¾" high. Overall print size: 26" wide x 15 ¾" high.
products.editionInfo: Limited Edition 175, Collectors Edition 25, Remarques 15, Double Remarques 10

products.title: Blue Horizon
products.description: Featuring P-51 Mustang 'Miss Helen' of the 352nd Fighter Group. By the Spring of 1945 the Luftwaffe was a shadow of its former self. Award-winning artist Keith Burns takes us to one such mission as pilots of the 352nd Fighter Group – the 'Blue Nosed Bastards of Bodney' – head back to base. Overall print size: 17 ¾" wide x 12 ½" high. Image size: 15" wide x 8 ¾" high.

products.title: Dawn Flight
products.description: The Mk.Vb Spitfire. Led by Battle Of Britain ace Sqn Ldr Robert 'Bobby' Oxspring, DFC & 2 Bars, AFC, Spitfire Mk Vb fighters of 91 (Nigeria) Sqn fly a first-light Fighter-Sweep across the channel to northern France in the summer of 1941. Giclée Print on Archival Paper measuring 33" x 24". Canvas edition 36" x 24".

products.title: Dazzling Displays
products.description: THE RED ARROWS. For decades the famed Red Arrows have been thrilling crowds with their dazzling displays. Founded in 1965, the Red Arrows have flown close to 5,000 displays in 57 countries. Overall print size: 20 ½" wide x 8 ¾" high. A magnificent triptych created in delicate pencil incorporating the dramatic use of colour.

products.title: Ferrari 328 GTB & Testarossa With Riva Aquarama
Fleet Action – A Book and Print Portfolio
Flight Against the Bismarck
products.description: 70th Anniversary Tribute. The Royal Navy's week long chase of the formidable German battleship Bismarck culminated in the foul evening weather of 26th May 1941. Despite the deck of HMS Ark Royal pitching through 55 feet, S/Lt John Moffat was one of fifteen Swordfish pilots who took off to attack Bismarck. Overall print size 16" x 26" / 40cms x 66cms.
products.editionInfo: Very Restricted Edition. Signed by 3 Swordfish pilots

products.title: Friday The 13th
products.description: A TRIBUTE TO THE HANDLEY-PAGE HALIFAX. Print & Information Booklet Portfolio by Robert Taylor. On the night of 11/12 March 1941, Halifax bombers went into action for the first time. The Halifax becoming the first of the four-engine 'heavies' to bomb Germany. Overall matted size approx.: 25 ½" wide x 17 ½" high. Image size approx.: 19 ¼" wide x 7 ½" high.
products.editionInfo: Veterans Edition 25 worldwide. Signed by Robert Taylor and 12 Halifax veterans

products.title: Hornblower and The Indefatigable – Giclee Canvas Proof
Knights Move
products.description: German Naval Art by Robert Taylor. Battleship Tirpitz. Aircraft: Me109s of JG5. The terrifying North Atlantic supply convoys to Russia began in September 1941 with Churchill's promise to Stalin.
products.editionInfo: Limited Edition signed by Major Eric Rudorffer, Oberleutnant Ernst Scheufele, Fähnrich Arnold Schroeder, Leutnant Zur See Willibald Völsing

products.title: Knights Move – Veterans Edition
products.description: Veterans Edition. Includes companion print 'Borne on Eagles Wings'. Signed by Major Eric Rudorffer, Oberleutnant Ernst Scheufele, Fähnrich Arnold Schroeder, Leutnant Zur See Willibald Völsing, Oberst Hajo Hermann, Unteroffizier Heinz Kern, Oberstleutnant Gunther Scholz, Leutnant Edmund 'Paule' Rossmann, Oberleutnant Walter Schuck, Unteroffizier Günther Kolb.

products.title: Low Holding Over The San Jacinto
Max Verstappen – 2021 F1 World Champion
products.description: This limited edition print celebrates Max Verstappen winning his first Formula One World Championship in 2021. The 2021 season saw one of the most closely fought battles between Lewis Hamilton and Max Verstappen unfold. Image size – 66cm x 32 cm. Mounted – 77cm x 46cm. Framed – 83 cm x 52cm.

products.title: McQueen's Machine
products.description: Celebrating the 50th anniversary of the Porsche 917 at its most iconic time, with Hollywood idol Steve McQueen at the wheel, from the 1971 movie 'Le Mans'. A limited edition of 500 giclee prints 90 x 70 cms.

products.title: Mosquito Thunder
products.description: A tribute to all those who flew the magnificent de Havilland Mosquito during the Second World War. Set on 1 April 1943 – the twenty-fifth anniversary of the RAF's formation – Anthony depicts Sqn Ldr Roy Ralston DSO DFM leading 105 Squadron as they race home to RAF Marham following a successful strike on the railway workshops in Trier. Image size: 22 ¼" wide x 14 ¾" high. Overall print size: 25 ¾" wide x 19 ½" high.
products.editionInfo: Limited Edition 200, Artist Proofs 25, Remarques 15, Giclée Studio Proofs 75, Double Remarques 10

products.title: Niki Lauda
products.description: Niki Lauda in action for Ferrari at the 1975 British Grand Prix held at Silverstone. The 1975 season saw him secure the first of his three Formula One World Championships. Born in Austria he was a Formula One driver and aviation entrepreneur. Niki Lauda is the only driver in F1 history to have been champion for both Ferrari and McLaren. Edition limited to 150 copies. Image Size: 40 x 30 cm. Mounted Size: 60 x 50 cm.

products.title: Schumacher at Monaco
products.description: Monaco GP 2003 – Michael Schumacher – Ferrari. Michael is featured in action in Monaco where he achieved a podium finish in third place. During the 2003 season he went on to win his 6th Formula 1 World Cup Championship. Limited Edition Giclee Print – Edition size: 500, measurement: 90 x 70 cms. Canvas Edition – Edition size: 250, 48" x 36".

products.title: The Doctor – Valentino Rossi
products.description: We celebrate the remarkable career of motorcycling legend Valentino Rossi with this new release by Ray Goldsbrough. The image shows Valentino celebrating what was to be the last of his 115 career race victories at the 2017 Dutch Moto GP. The release is limited to just 115 copies, one for each of his career race wins. Career Race Starts: 432, Career Race Wins: 115, World Championship Titles: 9. Image Size: 35.5 cm x 46 cm.
products.editionInfo: Limited to 115 copies – one for each career race win

products.title: The Sundowners
products.description: THE F-4 PHANTOM PORTFOLIO. Part of a powerful pair of prints featuring the iconic McDonnell Douglas F-4 Phantom II used extensively by both the USAF and USN in Vietnam. VF-111 – The Sundowners, depicting a colourful F-4 Phantom as it launches from the carrier USS Coral Sea on 6 March 1972. Overall Print Size: 26 ½" x 19 ¼". Image Size: 20 ¾" x 12 ¾".
products.editionInfo: Limited Edition 300, Artist Proofs 25, Remarques 25, Giclée Studio Proofs 75, Double Remarques 10

products.title: A Time For Heroes
products.description: Royal Air Force and Royal Navy Fighter Pilots of World War II. Spitfires of 234 Squadron return to St. Eval after intercepting heavy raids on south coast ports during the Battle of Britain. Overall Print Size 31" x 23". Signed by Group Captain Tom Dalton Morgan DSO DFC* OBE, Wing Commander Bob Doe DSO DFC*, Wing Commander George 'Grumpy' Unwin DSO DFM*, and others.
products.editionInfo: Battle of Britain Edition (3 signatures), Fighter Pilots Edition (9 signatures + companion print)

products.title: BRM – The Final Grand Prix Victory
Eye of the Storm – The Dambusters
